content:
As @5DN1L will tell you, please study the formatting syntax on this page: https://www.codingame.com/playgrounds/40701/help-center/statement, and format your statement properly as described in the points below.

Also, this problem is not a suitable puzzle; it is best converted into a clash of code given its difficulty. Thank you.

The first point raised by @User123 is correct. Always follow the example on the linked page and use the same presentation and formatting for your contributions.

Regarding the second point, the issue goes a bit further. At the moment, the task only requires multiplication. It lacks key programming elements such as lists, sets, dictionaries, string manipulation, loops, or conditions…

Please include one or more programming elements so that the task is a programming one rather than a purely maths one.
